name: Ve Bui
bio: Hi, I'm Ve Bui, a Full-Stack Software Engineer with experience designing and delivering enterprise applications across frontend, backend, cloud, and AI platforms. I specialize in building scalable systems using Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, SolidJS, PostgreSQL, AWS, and modern AI technologies. My work spans everything from user-facing applications and microservices to AI agents, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, workflow automation, and developer productivity tools. I enjoy solving complex problems at the intersection of software engineering and artificial intelligence, with a focus on creating solutions that are practical, reliable, and measurable in real-world environments. Currently, I'm focused on AI engineering, agentic workflows, and building tools that help teams move faster through automation, knowledge retrieval, and intelligent decision-making.
